tier_1.title: Sucking Mud
tier_1.description: The ground gives way. One wrong step and you're thigh-deep in mire.
tier_1.success: You test the ground with a pole and find the solid path.
tier_1.failure: Hours pulling each other free. Half a day gone.

tier_1.title: Giant Leeches
tier_1.description: The water ripples. Something large and dark surfaces.
tier_1.success: You spot them and take the dry ridge instead.
tier_1.failure: They latch on before anyone notices.

tier_1.title: Bog Berries
tier_1.description: Clusters of dark berries grow on low bushes at the water's edge.
tier_1.success: Edible, tart, and plentiful. Good haul.
tier_1.failure: They look similar to poisonous ones. Better not risk it.

tier_2.title: Will-o'-Wisps
tier_2.description: Pale lights dance over the water, drifting away from the path.
tier_2.success: You know the trick. Follow the moss, not the lights.
tier_2.failure: The party follows the lights into a dead end. A full day lost.

tier_2.title: Lizardfolk Hunters
tier_2.description: Scaled figures watch from the reeds, spears ready.
tier_2.success: You spot their sentries and negotiate passage with trade goods.
tier_2.failure: They attack. This is their hunting ground.
